7 #include "TimeEvolution.h"
8 /* Author : desrozis at Wed Oct 29 10:21:16 2014

10  */
11 
12 #ifdef WIN32
13 #include <ciso646>
14 #endif
15 
16 #include "ArcGeoSim/Time/ITimeStepComputer.h"
17 
18 #include <arcane/ISubDomain.h>
19 
20 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
21 
22 ArcGeoSim::TimeEvolution::
23 TimeEvolution(Arcane::ISubDomain* sd)
24  : Arcane::TraceAccessor(sd->traceMng())
25  , TimeVariables(sd)
26  , m_computer_for_restore(NULL)
27  , m_restore(false) {}
28 
29 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
30 
31 ArcGeoSim::TimeEvolution::
32 ~TimeEvolution()
33 {
34  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < m_ownership_computers.size(); ++i)
35  delete m_ownership_computers[i];
36 }
37 
38 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
39 
40 void
41 ArcGeoSim::TimeEvolution::
42 registerTimeStepComputer(TimeStep::IComputer* computer,
43  Ownership::ePolicy owner)
44 {
45  if(computer == NULL)
46  fatal() << "Time step computer pointer null";
47 
48  m_computers.add(computer);
49 
50  if(owner == Ownership::Take)
51  m_ownership_computers.add(computer);
52 }
53 
54 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
55 
56 void
57 ArcGeoSim::TimeEvolution::
58 replay()
59 {
60  if(m_computer_for_restore != NULL || m_restore == true)
61  fatal() << "Error in TimeEvolution - Use TimeStep::Replay for failed time step";
62 
63  m_restore = true;
64 }
65 
66 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
67 
68 void
69 ArcGeoSim::TimeEvolution::
70 replay(TimeStep::IComputer* computer)
71 {
72  if(computer == NULL)
73  fatal() << "TimeStep::IComputer pointer null";
74 
75  if(m_computer_for_restore != NULL || m_restore == true)
76  fatal() << "Error in TimeEvolution - Use TimeStep::Replay for failed time step";
77 
78  const Arcane::Integer size = m_computers.size();
79 
80  bool is_registered = false;
81 
82  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
83  is_registered |= (m_computers[i] == computer);
84  }
85 
86  if(not is_registered)
87  fatal() << "Error in TimeEvolution - Time step computer for restore is not registered";
88 
89  m_computer_for_restore = computer;
90  m_restore = true;
91 }
92 
93 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
94 
95 Arcane::Real
96 ArcGeoSim::TimeEvolution::
97 suggestedNextTimeStep() const
98 {
99  const Arcane::Integer size = m_computers.size();
100 
101  if(size == 0) {
102  return m_dt();
103  }
104 
105  Arcane::Real _dt = Arcane::FloatInfo<Arcane::Real>::maxValue();
106 
107  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
108  _dt = Arcane::math::min(_dt, m_computers[i]->nextTimeStep());
109  }
110 
111  return _dt;
112 }
113 
114 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
115 
116 Arcane::Real
117 ArcGeoSim::TimeEvolution::
118 suggestedRestoredTimeStep() const
119 {
120  Arcane::Real _dt = Arcane::FloatInfo<Arcane::Real>::maxValue();
121 
122  if(m_computer_for_restore == NULL) {
123 
124  const Arcane::Integer size = m_computers.size();
125 
126  if(size == 0)
127  fatal() << "Restore can't be used - no policy for restoring!";
128 
129  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
130  _dt = Arcane::math::min(_dt, m_computers[i]->restoredTimeStep());
131  }
132 
133  } else {
134 
135  _dt = Arcane::math::min(_dt, m_computer_for_restore->restoredTimeStep());
136 
137  m_computer_for_restore = NULL;
138  }
139 
140  m_restore = false;
141 
142  return _dt;
143 }
144
